# John Mark Talento Estrada

> John Mark Talento Estrada (johnstr) is a backend developer based in Tagaytay City, Philippines. He designs and builds web and mobile applications using PHP, Python, JavaScript, and modern frameworks, and has experience maintaining e-commerce systems. He is available for freelance projects.

## Availability / Hire

John Mark is available for **freelance** backend development and web/mobile engineering projects:

- Full-stack web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, React)
- Mobile application development (React Native, Flutter, Dart)
- API development & integration (Python, PHP, SQL)
- Database setup & optimization (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase)

To hire or discuss a project, email jhnmrkmain@gmail.com.

## About

John Mark Talento Estrada is a backend developer focused on building scalable web/mobile applications and improving user experience. He has experience maintaining e-commerce platforms using PHP, JS, and SQL, implementing frontend upgrades, and resolving database connection issues.

- Name: John Mark Talento Estrada
- Handle: johnstr
- Roles: Backend Developer, Web Developer
- Location: Tagaytay City, Philippines
- Website: https://johnstr.onrender.com

## Skills

- Languages: PHP, Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Dart
- Frameworks: React, React Native, Flutter
- Databases & Cloud: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase, Supabase
- Developer Tools: Git, GitHub, Vercel, Render
- Operating Systems: Windows, Linux
- AI Tools: Cursor, Claude, Antigravity, Codex

## Experience

- **Web Developer Intern** — PCLE Computer Worx (2022-09 - 2023-02)
  - Updated JavaScript, PHP, and SQL code for the company's e-commerce platform, which resolved database connection issues and maintained site stability during high-traffic periods.
  - Redesigned the frontend checkout interface using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, fixing mobile display bugs and making the purchasing process simpler for users.
  - Tested payment gateway functionality alongside senior team members, identifying and patching security vulnerabilities to reduce transaction errors.

## Education

- **Bachelor of Science in Computer Science** — AISAT DASMA (October 2023 - Present)
- **Information and Communication Technology** — Olivarez College Tagaytay (April 2023)

## Projects

- **EVYM HUMANIZER** — Developed a system to rewrite AI-generated content into natural human patterns, resulting in a 25% increase in user engagement for client projects. (GitHub: https://github.com/4xachi/evym-humanizer)
- **EYYSATCITY** — Created an interactive student simulation environment that tracks user progress, allowing for better identification of resource gaps and increased support follow-ups. (GitHub: https://github.com/4xachi/EYYSATCITY)
- **PRIVACY RESUME** — Built an AI-powered resume builder tool that reduced user document creation time by 40% through automated content suggestions. (Website: https://privacy-cv.onrender.com)
